overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a grand medieval great hall with floating candle chandeliers, gothic stone architecture, and students seated at long dining tables. The scene features warm candlelight illuminating the stone pillars and stained glass windows at the far end.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by floating candle chandeliers. Students are seated at long house tables on either side, dining and conversing, while massive stone pillars support the vaulted ceiling. Stained glass windows glow with blue light at the far end behind the high table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall where warm candlelight contrasts with cool distant tones. It begins by capturing the vastness of the vaulted ceiling supported by massive stone pillars, with floating candle chandeliers casting a soft glow over the space. The perspective then settles on students seated at long house tables on either side, engaged in dining and conversation. Finally, the gaze extends toward the far end of the hall, where the high table is framed by stained glass windows glowing with a deep blue light.
